en: Up to 29 degrees on the weekend: weather brings early summer with interruptions. A cold front will move across Austria on Friday, and lots of sunshine is expected at the weekend.

title: Schwer verletzter Wanderer: „Dass er die Nacht überlebt hat, grenzt an ein Wunder“
description: Ein Mann aus Ettlingen kehrt nicht von einer Wanderung in den Tiroler Bergen zurück. Erst am nächsten Morgen kann ein Rettungsteam ihn im Schnee finden – schwer verletzt, aber am Leben.

en: Seriously injured hiker: “The fact that he survived the night is nothing short of a miracle.” A man from Ettlingen does not return from a hike in the Tyrolean mountains. It wasn't until the next morning that a rescue team found him in the snow - seriously injured, but alive.
la: Gravissime laesus hiker: "Quod supervixit noctis nihil est miraculum." Vir ab Ettlingen non redit in AMBULA in montibus Raetici. Non postridie mane factum est ut turmae liberandae eum in nive invenerunt - graviter laesum, sed vivum.
